name: vexascript
description: Node.js CLI project for VexaScript, a TypeScript-like language with compiler and language server

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && node_modules/.bin/esbuild cli/cli-bin.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/vexa.js --sourcemap --external:commander --external:vscode-languageserver --external:vscode-languageserver-textdocument --external:source-map --external:esbuild --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --log-level=error && cp compiler/runtime/es2025.d.ts dist/es2025.d.ts && cp compiler/runtime/dom.d.ts dist/dom.d.ts && cp compiler/runtime/vexascript.d.vx dist/vexascript.d.vx && chmod +x dist/vexa.js
scripts.package: pnpm clean && pnpm build && pnpm pack
